title: JavaScript Objects
summary: Object literals, properties, methods, and accessing nested data.

examples.title: Object literal
examples.description: Store related data in one object and read properties.

files.css:
body { font-family: sans-serif; padding: 1.5rem; }
pre { background: #f1f5f9; padding: 1rem; border-radius: 8px; }

examples.title: Object array for site sections
examples.description: Blog posts, features, or team members are often stored as an array of objects—JavaScript loops through them to build the page. Three sections (title + text) rendered from data in an array. Add a fourth object to the sections array.

practice.description: Create a product object with name, price, and a method display() that returns a formatted string.
